/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libpdl.a CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_mcu/pdl_mcu.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_mcu/pdl_mcu_can.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_mcu/pdl_mcu_serial.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_mcu/pdl_mcu_protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_satellite/pdl_satellite.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_satellite/pdl_satellite_can.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_bmc/pdl_bmc.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_bmc/pdl_payload_bmc_net.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_bmc/pdl_payload_bmc_ipmi.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libpdl.a
